identity.name: The Creative Studio Builder
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix raw brutalism with refined glassmorphism.
Editor is the Cockpit: Dark, technical, high-contrast UI for the builder; Clean canvas for the site.
Motion is Feedback: Every drag, drop, and click must feel physical and magnetic.

usage_rules.gradients: Do NOT use full-screen gradients. Use subtle noise textures or 'glow' spots behind key elements.
usage_rules.text_contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance. Use #FAFAFA for primary text in dark mode, not #FFFFFF.
usage_rules.active_states: Active tools/sections must glow or have a high-contrast border (Electric Indigo).

rules.headings: Use 'Outfit' for all section headers and modal titles. Use 'Manrope' for long content.
rules.ui: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for pixel values, hex codes, and spacing controls.
rules.uppercase: All UI labels (e.g., 'WIDTH', 'HEIGHT', 'PADDING') must be uppercase and tracking-widest.

layout_rules.section_gap: gap-4 for dense UI, gap-8 for canvas sections
layout_rules.touch_target: Minimum 44px height for all interactive inputs.

effects.tracing_beam: Use for selecting sections. Animated gradient border.
effects.noise: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay on the dark background to prevent banding.

builder_workspace.structure: Fixed layout. Left Sidebar (Library) + Top Bar (Actions) + Right Sidebar (Properties) + Center Canvas.

canvas_area.behavior: Infinite scroll feel (even if fixed). Center the page content.
canvas_area.shadow: Page preview must have shadow-2xl to separate from canvas.

panels.behavior: Collapsible or Floating. Must not obscure the canvas unless necessary.

section_library.card_style: Aspect ratio 16:9 previews. Minimalist. Hover: Zoom preview + 'Add' button appears.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 transition-all duration-200 font-medium

inputs.default: bg-input/50 border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary font-mono text-sm
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-1.5 block

drag_overlay.style: opacity-90 scale-105 shadow-2xl cursor-grabbing border-2 border-primary rotate-2 z-50
drag_overlay.drop_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-primary/50 bg-primary/5 rounded-lg transition-all

interactions.toast: Use sonner for all notifications (Save success, Error, etc).

do_not: Use 'alert' or native 'confirm' dialogs (use Shadcn Dialog).
must_do: Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure keyboard navigation works for the builder panels. Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-primary).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-performance React builder. Use the provided design tokens. Implement the 'Hybrid' theme: Dark UI for the tool, Light Canvas for the content. Use 'dnd-kit' or 'react-beautiful-dnd' if drag and drop logic is needed, but focus on the visual wrapper first. Ensure the 'Section Library' looks like a premium design catalog, not a file picker.
